name: milestone-world-transition
description: Validate depth, rank, quest, and material-tier milestones plus tier-specific lighting, particles, landmarks, and music behavior.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke('Reset') c:Invoke('SetStats',{Power=1500000000,WallLevel=99,Depth=8,DailyBreaks=9,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local r=c:Invoke('HitDepthBlock',{layer=10,column=6,row=1}) task.wait(.5) return H:JSONEncode({ok=r.ok,depth=r.Depth,landmarks=workspace.PunchWallRPG:GetAttribute('DepthTierLandmarkCount')})

steps.label: cross rank and material tier naturally
wait for milestone queue and atmosphere tween

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local f=root['Depth Tier Landmarks'] local enabledByTier={} for _,m in ipairs(f:GetChildren()) do local n=0 for _,d in ipairs(m:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA('ParticleEmitter') and d.Enabled then n+=1 end end enabledByTier[tostring(m:GetAttribute('MaterialTier'))]=n end local center=0 for _,d in ipairs(g:GetDescendants()) do if d.Name=='FeedbackPop' or d.Name=='LocalDamageNumber' or d.Name=='CombatDamageBurst' then center+=1 end end return H:JSONEncode({depth=g:GetAttribute('MilestoneSeenDepthRecord') or 0,rank=g:GetAttribute('MilestoneSeenRankChange') or 0,tier=g:GetAttribute('MilestoneSeenTierEntry') or 0,quest=g:GetAttribute('MilestoneSeenQuestComplete') or 0,toasts=g:GetAttribute('MilestoneToastCount') or 0,activeTier=g:GetAttribute('ActiveMaterialTier'),activeLandmarks=g:GetAttribute('ActiveTierLandmarkCount'),musicVariant=g:GetAttribute('TierMusicVariant'),tierOneParticles=enabledByTier['1'] or 0,tierTwoParticles=enabledByTier['2'] or 0,center=center,centerEnabled=g:GetAttribute('CenterActionFeedbackEnabled')})

steps.label: all milestone and tier feedback channels update

args.code: local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] p:SetAttribute('LastWallHit',0) return c:Invoke('HitDepthBlock',{layer=10,column=7,row=1})

steps.label: break ordinary block in current tier

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local center=0 for _,d in ipairs(g:GetDescendants()) do if d.Name=='FeedbackPop' or d.Name=='LocalDamageNumber' or d.Name=='CombatDamageBurst' then center+=1 end end return H:JSONEncode({center=center,centerEnabled=g:GetAttribute('CenterActionFeedbackEnabled'),tier=g:GetAttribute('ActiveMaterialTier')})

steps.label: normal block destruction does not spam center screen
